widgets.title: Unit Price by Customer Over Order Date
widgets.description: Trend of unit price by customer over time.
widgets.dataKey: SELECT date_trunc('month', "order_date") AS x, "customer" AS series, AVG("unit_price") AS value FROM "t_ecommerce_orders" GROUP BY x, series ORDER BY x ASC, series ASC

widgets.title: Quantity vs Unit Price Correlation
widgets.description: Correlation between quantity ordered and unit price of products.
widgets.dataKey: SELECT CAST(SUM("quantity") AS DOUBLE) AS x, AVG("unit_price") AS y FROM "t_ecommerce_orders" GROUP BY "product" ORDER BY x ASC

widgets.title: Customer × Product Heatmap
widgets.description: A heatmap showing the relationship between customers and the products they purchased.
widgets.dataKey: SELECT "customer" AS row, "product" AS col, CAST(SUM("quantity") AS DOUBLE) AS value FROM "t_ecommerce_orders" GROUP BY "customer", "product" ORDER BY value DESC LIMIT 400

widgets.title: Customer Ranked by Unit Price
widgets.description: Ranking customers based on their total unit price across all orders.
widgets.dataKey: SELECT "customer" AS label, CAST(SUM("unit_price") AS DOUBLE) AS value FROM "t_ecommerce_orders" GROUP BY "customer" ORDER BY value DESC LIMIT 25

widgets.title: Total Proportion by Customer
widgets.description: Distribution of total sales by customer.
widgets.dataKey: SELECT "customer" AS label, CAST(SUM("total") AS DOUBLE) AS value FROM "t_ecommerce_orders" GROUP BY "customer" ORDER BY value DESC LIMIT 30

widgets.title: Quantity vs Unit Price by Customer
widgets.description: Comparison of quantity ordered and unit price for each customer.
widgets.dataKey: SELECT "customer" AS label, CAST(SUM("quantity") AS DOUBLE) AS value1, CAST(SUM("unit_price") AS DOUBLE) AS value2 FROM "t_ecommerce_orders" GROUP BY "customer" ORDER BY (value1 + value2) DESC LIMIT 20

widgets.title: Customer Composition by Product
widgets.description: Distribution of customers across different products.
widgets.dataKey: SELECT "product" AS label, "customer" AS "group", CAST(COUNT(DISTINCT "customer") AS DOUBLE) AS value FROM "t_ecommerce_orders" GROUP BY "product", "customer" ORDER BY value DESC LIMIT 25

widgets.title: Multi-Metric Profile by Customer
widgets.description: Comparison of various metrics by customer.
widgets.dataKey: SELECT "customer" AS axis, CAST(SUM("total") AS DOUBLE) AS value FROM "t_ecommerce_orders" GROUP BY "customer" ORDER BY value DESC LIMIT 12

widgets.title: Unit Price Volume Over Order Date
widgets.description: This visualization shows the total unit price volume over the order date.
widgets.dataKey: SELECT date_trunc('month', "order_date") AS x, CAST(SUM("unit_price" * "quantity") AS DOUBLE) AS value FROM "t_ecommerce_orders" GROUP BY x ORDER BY x ASC

widgets.title: Customer Composition Over Order Date
widgets.description: This visualization shows the composition of customers over time based on their order dates.
widgets.dataKey: SELECT date_trunc('month', "order_date") AS x, "customer" AS series, CAST(COUNT(*) AS DOUBLE) AS value FROM "t_ecommerce_orders" GROUP BY x, series ORDER BY x ASC, series ASC
